creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yusuf Yaman from comment #7)
Yes, you're right. The freebsd/Makefile doesn't support staging. You've two choices: patch the freebsd/Makefile or the do-install does the install stage.

Another thing: as I see the ${FIND} doesn't find any file in post-patch. If it's true you should remove it.

If you think you're ready share the diff.
